tree.name: Harrison Barnes
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: CHI traded DeRozan to SAC; SAC traded Barnes + 2031 1st swap to SAS; SAC traded Duarte + 2025 2nd + 2028 2nd + cash to CHI. SAS sent RaiQuan Gray to CHI to facilitate.
tree.note: Forward originally drafted 7th overall by Golden State in 2012. SAS used cap space to absorb Barnes' salary as part of facilitating the DeRozan sign-and-trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: RaiQuan Gray
assetsGivenUp.note: Undrafted forward, signed by SAS. Sent to Chicago to facilitate the 3-team deal.
